textual_description: Overcast public scene with weak separation and large empty sky.
Close foreground passerby with readable middle and distant layers.
Crowded street with multiple people but partial overlap in the center.
Open campsite with car, picnic setup, one moving subject, and a distant figure near water.
Night street with neon signs, reflections, and separated figures.
Hard edge object pressing from one side while the main action unfolds deeper in the frame.
Main subject in the foreground with a calmer secondary actor across water or open space.
Vehicle occupies much of the frame while people and setting provide the remaining layers.
One subject dominates too much of the frame and weakens layered complexity.
Muted colors but decent spatial layering and human relationships.
Hard daylight, shadow bands, and figures separated by bright and dark zones.
Main subject plus a subtle but important second actor deeper in the frame.
